info.name: Two-factor OATH (advanced)
info.summary: Advanced OATH two-factor provider: TOTP, HOTP and OCRA
info.description:
Configurable OATH two-factor authentication for Nextcloud, covering all three OATH algorithms in one provider.
- **TOTP** (RFC 6238), **HOTP** (RFC 4226) and **OCRA** challenge-response (RFC 6287), selectable per token - Per-token hash algorithm (SHA-1 to SHA-512), digits (4 to 10), TOTP period or HOTP counter, and OCRA suite - Custom or random secrets, with clear strength presets (128 to 640 bit) and secrets encrypted at rest - A **Strict RFC** switch for safe, interoperable defaults, without losing the freedom to deviate - Admin-managed enrollment for whole groups, with **bulk provisioning** (sorting, filtering, live validation), CSV export and paste import - One-click **import from the bundled twofactor_totp**, so existing users switch over without being locked out - Issuer icon embedded in the QR code, HOTP resynchronisation, and a software OCRA token for testing
Built for hardware OATH tokens and elevated requirements, alongside the simple, bundled twofactor_totp app. OATH (one-time passwords) is not the same as FIDO2/WebAuthn. See documentation for when to use which.
info.author: [ernolf] Raphael Gradenwitz
